column1: # SheSafe Crime Evidence Dataset (Generated using LatinHypercube Sampling)
# 1. LatinHypercube sampling for base spatial distribution
# 2. Hotspot biasing (60% cluster near known high-risk areas)
# 3. Category distribution based on UK Police statistics
# This is a SEMI-SYNTHETIC dataset modeling realistic crime geography.
# It is NOT real police data
# - UK Police Data API category distributions
# Demonstrates the system's ability to integrate historical crime evidence
# into route risk assessment and safety explanations.
